channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What travelers should know about Europe's new Entry/Exit System
item.description: Travel experts advise being prepared for possible disruptions as the new Entry/Exit System is implemented across the EU and other countries.

item.title: Trump appoints controversial housing official Bill Pulte as acting intelligence chief
item.description: President Trump announced Tuesday he is selecting housing official Bill Pulte to serve as acting director of national intelligence, replacing Tuls...

item.title: New York Democrats take initial steps toward an aggressive 2028 redistricting plan
item.description: New York Democrats are entering the national redistricting wars, though a victory before this year's midterm elections is unlikely.

item.title: Trump signs executive order to vet top AI models for national security risks
item.description: President Donald Trump has signed a new executive order on artificial intelligence oversight, less than two weeks after postponing a White House ce...
